posts.author: douglas (Douglas)
posts.cookedHtml:
Per discussion in "Call summary" not being returned as the correct type with timeline query? - #9 by Matias.Monday, seems like it is not possible at the moment to obtain activity subtypes.

It will really help to have the ability to get activity subtypes like “Meeting”, “Call Summary” and “Custom” to develop timeline & activities features.
